title: Caramel Plus
description: A very, very large modpack that I created just for fun.
body:
# Caramel Plus: Enhanced Vanilla Minecraft

Caramel Plus is a Minecraft modpack that remakes the Vanilla experience with carefully selected mods. Currently indev, it offers a more immersive and beautiful world without straying too far from the core game. Explore enhanced structures, stunning new biomes, and dynamic seasons across all dimensions. Enjoy improved performance, visual enhancements, and quality of life features that make your Minecraft journey smoother and more enjoyable with server support!

## Key Features:

- **Enhanced Structures**: Revamped vanilla structures and new unique discoveries
- **Beautiful Landscapes**: New biomes, improved End and Nether, and dynamic seasonal changes
- **Optimized Performance**: Smooth gameplay with better world loading and frame rates
- **Visual Enhancements**: Shader support, connected textures, and expanded building options
- **Quality of Life**: Helpful tooltips, improved UI, advanced inventory management, and mapping
- **Immersive Audio**: Rich environmental sounds and realistic movement audio
- **Fauna Enhancements**: New animals, improved mob behaviors, and animations
- **Adventure and Exploration**: Archaeology, cave enhancements, and functional vehicles

## Mod Highlights:

- YUNG's Better series for improved vanilla structures
- Terralith and Terratonic for stunning new biomes
- Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore for performance optimization
- Iris for shader support and Continuity for connected textures
- Sophisticated Backpacks for inventory management
- AmbientSounds for immersive audio
- Immersive Aircraft and Nifty Ships for vehicle adventures

Whether you're a builder, explorer, or survival enthusiast, Caramel Plus offers a sweet blend of vanilla Minecraft with carefully chosen enhancements. Experience the familiar world of Minecraft in a whole new light!

**Owner Recommends Java Memory Set to 4K!**
